wait_robbery: You need to wait before attempting another robbery.
not_enough_police: Not enough police in the city.
rope_attached: Rope attached to ATM. Now attach the other end to a vehicle.
rope_vehicle_attached: Rope attached to vehicle. Drive away to pull the ATM loose.
atm_detached: ATM pulled loose! Interact with it to collect the cash.
no_vehicle_nearby: No vehicle nearby. Park a vehicle within range first.
